# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a collaboration logo between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI, followed by a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. A speaker explains the importance of high-quality data, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of data centers and server rooms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video transitions to scenic aerial views from the Flight Simulator, showcasing detailed landscapes, including coastlines, mountains, and castles, highlighting the realism and visual fidelity of the simulation. This segment visually demonstrates the immersive experience enabled by the technology.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus shifts back to a speaker discussing the high fidelity of cognitive services' offerings, emphasizing how the voices sound more human-like. The video then cuts to scenes at an airport, showing an airplane on the tarmac, ground crew directing the plane, and close-ups of the aircraft, reinforcing the integration of realistic audio and visuals in the simulation. The segment ends with the Microsoft logo on a black screen.

transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.
